steps.description: Press the "F1" key to activate the command palette in Visual Studio Code while using the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Type the text 'Microsoft 365 agents: publish' into the command palette input field in the Visual Studio Code interface, within the context of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Microsoft 365 Agents: Publish" command from the dropdown in the Visual Studio Code Command Palette.
@assertion notification "actions in publish stage executed successfully" exist
